name: Neiro
archetype: Tech-minded outlier Stormcaller, level 7, studies magic like science
speech_patterns: Speaks in technical terms and measurements
Treats magic as a system to be analyzed
quirks: Keeps detailed logs of spell performance
Tries to quantify everything with numbers
Fascinated by machines and mechanisms despite being a mage
example_phrases: Based on my calculations, that spell has a 73% success rate in these conditions.
Interesting anomaly. Let me document this for later analysis.
Magic is just science we haven't fully explained yet.
I've optimized my lightning bolt sequence. Want to see the efficiency gains?
Hold on. Something about this doesn't add up. Give me a moment to recalculate.
